description: PLEASE CONTACT ZACHARY PFEFFERLE - OTTAWA - MONTREAL- 1-833-829-2248 EXTENSION 2012 Sea Ray is the world’s leading manufacturer of high-end pleasure boats, renowned for their superior craftsmanship, innovative engineering, and timeless design. The Sundancer series, in particular, revolutionized the boating industry by introducing the mid-cabin stateroom, setting the global standard for express cruisers that blend sleek, sporty performance with the luxurious accommodations of a much larger yacht. The 2003 Sea Ray 340 Sundancer is a masterclass in space management, featuring an expansive 12-foot beam that creates a massive cockpit and an airy, open-concept salon. This specific model is powered by Twin 8.1L MerCruiser "Big Block" engines with ZF V-drive shafts, delivering a robust 740HP total (2x 370hp) for effortless cruising. The layout includes a convertible mid-berth, a forward pedestal bed, and a full-service galley with a 12,000 BTU air conditioning unit dedicated to the forward stateroom. This year of production was widely celebrated for its improved hull design and ergonomic helm layout, making it one of the most popular 34-foot cruisers ever built. FRESHWATER - TWIN BIG BLOCK 8.1L MERCRUISER ENGINES - 740HP - V-DRIVE SHAFT DRIVE - 4.5KW WESTERBEKE GENERATOR - NEW MICAS (2025/26) - CUSTOM EXTERIOR FLOORING - INDUCTION STOVE - FULL HEAT & AC - RECENT ANTIFOULING - PROFESSIONAL MAINTENANCE ONLY +++ This particular 340 Sundancer is a standout example of "pride of ownership," having been maintained to an impeccable professional standard and recently valued at $150,000. With a dedicated service history including a full hull wax and new silicone seals in 2024, brand-new batteries in 2023, and high-end custom exterior flooring installed in 2022, this vessel shows like a much newer boat. The addition of custom-made bedding, upgraded induction cooking, and brand-new micas (scheduled for 2025-2026) makes this a turn-key opportunity for the discerning boater seeking a freshwater-ready cruiser that requires absolutely no immediate investment. La série Sundancer, en particulier, a révolutionné l'industrie nautique en introduisant la cabine intermédiaire (mid-cabin), établissant la norme mondiale pour les cruisers express qui allient des performances sportives élégantes aux accommodements luxueux d'un yacht beaucoup plus grand. Le Sea Ray 340 Sundancer 2003 est un chef-d'œuvre de gestion de l'espace, doté d'une largeur impressionnante de 12 pieds qui crée un cockpit immense et un salon à aire ouverte très aéré. Ce modèle spécifique est propulsé par deux moteurs MerCruiser 8.1L "Big Block" avec transmission en V (V-Drive), développant un total robuste de 740 CV (2x 370 cv) pour une navigation fluide. L'aménagement comprend une couchette intermédiaire convertible, un lit sur piédestal à l'avant et une cuisine complète, permettant de loger confortablement jusqu'à six personnes. Cette année de production a été largement célébrée pour sa conception de coque améliorée et son poste de pilotage ergonomique. EAU DOUCE - DEUX MOTEURS 8.1L BIG BLOCK MERCRUISER - 740 CV - TRANSMISSION V-DRIVE - GÉNÉRATRICE WESTERBEKE 4.5KW - NOUVEAUX MICAS (2025/26) - TAPIS EXTÉRIEUR SUR MESURE - POÊLE À INDUCTION - CHAUFFAGE ET CLIMATISATION CENTRALE - ANTIFOULING RÉCENT - ENTRETIEN PROFESSIONNEL UNIQUEMENT +++ Ce 340 Sundancer particulier est un exemple exceptionnel de "fierté de propriété", ayant été entretenu selon des normes professionnelles irréprochables (évalué récemment à 150 000 $). Avec un historique d'entretien méticuleux incluant un cirage complet de la coque et le remplacement des joints de silicone en 2024, des batteries neuves en 2023 et un tapis extérieur personnalisé installé en 2022, ce navire présente un état esthétique remarquable. L'ajout d'une douillette sur mesure, d'un poêle à induction moderne et de nouveaux micas prévus pour 2025-2026 en fait une opportunité "clé en main" pour l'acheteur exigeant qui recherche un bateau prêt pour l'eau douce sans investissement immédiat. The Crownline E30 2018 is built around maximizing open-air space and onboard social flow. Its layout is centered on a large cockpit designed for entertaining, with multiple convertible seating areas that adapt between cruising, lounging, and sun pad configurations. The helm station is integrated into a full hardtop layout with adjacent seating, allowing passengers to remain engaged with the driving experience while underway or at anchor. An enclosed head compartment is located within the helm console, providing basic onboard convenience for day use. Powered by a sterndrive performance hull, the E30 delivers strong acceleration, responsive handling, and stable cruising suited for lakes and coastal waters.
